description: Auto-QA self-tuning config for ACMM L5. Tunes sensitivity based on PR acceptance rate.

auto_raise.note: Raise only after quarterly review; never lower a threshold once raised

tuning_rules.then: add comment to next PR: 'Acceptance rate is below 50% — please review recent meta-improvement issues'
block deploy, file meta-improvement issue immediately

note: This file is the encoded policy. The runtime equivalent is nightly-compliance.yml. See ACMM L5 'Self-tuning' criterion.
